What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A rectangular metal baking pan sits centrally, filled with a casserole topped with mashed potatoes featuring a fork-ridged pattern. A blue-handled fork textures the surface and rests on top. To the left of the pan, a metal box grater with a red frame stands upright. A white container is visible in the upper left corner near the grater.

Describe the visible changes to the casserole topping and tools placed on it throughout the video.
canonical_answer: At 2s, a hand smooths the mashed potato topping with vertical ridges; at 5s, a blue utensil textures the surface further; at 13s, the topping shows a cross-hatch piped pattern; at 15s, a blue-handled fork rests on the casserole surface.
